title: magnolia liliiflora var. gracilis
intro: Magnolia liliiflora var. gracilis, also known as the saucer magnolia or narrow-leaf saucer magnolia, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the magnolia family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues, due to its bioactive compounds like magnolol and honokiol. Herbal preparations of Magnolia liliiflora var. gracilis include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
